channel.title: Cybersecurity Threat Index
channel.description: Your comprehensive cybersecurity intelligence briefing. Multiple daily cybersecurity bulletins are available on demand at QuantitativeGenius.com.
channel.itunes:author: Quantitative Genius
channel.itunes:summary: Your comprehensive cybersecurity intelligence briefing. Multiple daily cybersecurity bulletins are available on demand at QuantitativeGenius.com.

item.title: Cybersecurity Threat Index — April 1, 2026
item.description: THREAT LEVEL: 78% (HIGH / ORANGE) — up from 73 percent. Chrome zero-day CVE-2026-5281 added to CISA KEV; North Korea Axios supply chain attack; Iran Handala wipes 200K+ Stryker systems; Citrix NetScaler CVE-2026-3055 under active exploitation; March ransomware surge at 780 attacks with utilities up 630%.
